text:
Dependence - Full staff performance of activity during entire 7 days, 8 = Activity did not occur during entire 7 days.
221 G1HB G1HB_SUPP_EAT (G1HB) Eating Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: eating - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
222 G1IA G1IA_SELF_TOLIET (G1IA) Toilet
